channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Report: GOP support for Netanyahu drops sharply
item.description: Republican backing for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has fallen sharply in the past month as President Trump publicly criticized him.

item.title: National security scandal: Anti-Trump Jack Smith team violated classified info rules
A look inside the America 250th time capsule buried in Philadelphia
item.description: Congress buried a time capsule near Independence Hall in Philadelphia for America's 250th anniversary, sealed until 2276.

item.title: Mike Rowe says history shows why Americans keep rejecting socialism
item.description: Mike Rowe suggests Americans who aren't proud of the U.S. may need a history lesson or a visit abroad on the 250th anniversary.
